tasks.label: Start Streamlit app
tasks.command: cd prototype && if timeout 1 bash -c '</dev/tcp/localhost/8501' 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Streamlit is already listening on port 8501 from a previous session. Skipping start to avoid a port collision. Use Ctrl+C in the other Task terminal if you want to restart it.'; else if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run streamlit run app.py; else streamlit run app.py; fi; fi
